programs.source: m=extract;f=solve(p0:$str):$str{let result=mut."";let i=mut.0;let len=p0.len;lp(let idx=0;idx<len;idx=idx+1){let ch=p0.get(idx);if(ch="$"){let j=mut.idx+1;lp(let k=j;k<len;k=k+1){let c=p0.get(k);if(c=";"){idx=k;br};if(c=" "){j=k+1}el{if(c="}"){idx=k;br}}};if(!(idx<len)){}el{let lhs=p0.slice(j;idx);let rhs=p0.slice(j;idx);if(lhs="interface"){let k=mut.idx+1;lp(let m=k;m<len;m=m+1){let c=p0.get(m);if(c="}"){idx=m;br};if(c=" "){k=m+1}el{if(c="}"){idx=m;br}}};if(!(idx<len)){}el{let body=p0.slice(j;idx);result=s.concat(s.concat(s.concat(s.concat(result;lhs);" ");rhs);" {");result=s.concat(result;body);result=s.concat(result;"}");}}}};<result};

programs.hint: Compiles + builds + runs, but output doesn't match expected. Verify: (a) format strings — use s.format(val;"%.4f") for floats with exact decimal places; (b) trailing newlines / whitespace match the expected output exactly; (c) loop boundaries (off-by-one); (d) algorithm correctness against the test cases.
programs.source: m=docextract;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=extractdocs(content:$str):$void{let lines=s.split(content;"\n");let idx=mut.0;let indocstring=mut.false;let funcname=mut."";let doclines=mut.@();lp(idx<lines.len()){let line=s.trim(lines.get(idx));if(s.contains(line;"def ")){let parts=s.split(line;" ");if(parts.len()>=2){let namepart=parts.get(1);let nameparts=s.split(namepart;"(");if(nameparts.len()>=1){funcname=nameparts.get(0);indocstring=false}}};if(s.contains(line;"\"\"\"")){if(indocstring=false){indocstring=true;doclines=@()}el{if(indocstring=true){let doctext=mut."";let didx=mut.0;lp(didx<doclines.len()){if(didx>0){doctext=s.concat(doctext;" ")};doctext=s.concat(doctext;doclines.get(didx));didx=didx+1};io.println(s.concat(s.concat(funcname;": ");doctext));indocstring=false;funcname=""}}};if(indocstring=true){if(!s.contains(line;"\"\"\"")){let trimmed=s.trim(line);if(s.len(trimmed)>0){doclines=doclines.append(trimmed)}}};idx=idx+1}};f=main():$i64{let content=mut."";let line=mut.io.readln();lp(s.len(line)>0){content=s.concat(content;s.concat(line;"\n"));line=io.readln()};extractdocs(content);<0}

programs.hint: Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.
programs.source: m=scoreboard;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=main():$i64{let names=mut.@();let scores=mut.@();let count=mut.0;let line=mut.io.readln();lp(s.len(line)>0){let parts=s.split(line;" ");let cmd=parts.get(0);if(cmd="score"){let nm=parts.get(1);let sc=s.toint(parts.get(2));let found=mut.0;found=found-1;let i=mut.0;lp(i<count){if(names.get(i)=nm){found=i};i=i+1};if(found<0){names=names+@(nm);scores=scores+@(sc);count=count+1}el{let ns=mut.@();let j=mut.0;lp(j<count){if(j=found){ns=ns+@(sc)}el{ns=ns+@(scores.get(j))};j=j+1};scores=ns}};if(cmd="rank"){let nm=parts.get(1);let target=mut.0;let i=mut.0;lp(i<count){if(names.get(i)=nm){target=scores.get(i)};i=i+1};let rank=mut.1;let k=mut.0;lp(k<count){if(scores.get(k)>target){rank=rank+1};k=k+1};io.println(s.concat(s.concat(nm;" is rank ");s.fromint(rank)))};if(cmd="top"){let topn=s.toint(parts.get(1));let used=mut.@();let u=mut.0;lp(u<count){used=used+@(0);u=u+1};let picks=mut.0;lp(picks<topn){if(picks<count){let best=mut.0;best=best-1;let bestsc=mut.0;let bi=mut.0;lp(bi<count){if(used.get(bi)=0){if(best<0){best=bi;bestsc=scores.get(bi)}el{if(scores.get(bi)>bestsc){best=bi;bestsc=scores.get(bi)}}};bi=bi+1};if(best>=0){let nu=mut.@();let w=mut.0;lp(w<count){if(w=best){nu=nu+@(1)}el{nu=nu+@(used.get(w))};w=w+1};used=nu;let pos=picks+1;io.println(s.concat(s.concat(s.concat(s.fromint(pos);". ");s.concat(names.get(best);": "));s.fromint(scores.get(best))))}};picks=picks+1}};line=io.readln()};<0}

programs.hint: Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
programs.source: m=anagram;f=sortchars(s:$str):$str{let arr=s.chars();let n=arr.len;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){lp(let j=0;j<n-1;j=j+1){let a=arr.get(j);let b=arr.get(j+1);if(a>b){arr.get(j)=b;arr.get(j+1)=a;};};};let result=arr.intostr();<result};f=isanagram(s:$str;t:$str):$bool{let ss=sortchars(s);let tt=sortchars(t);if(ss=tt){<true};<false};f=findanagrams(word:$str;dict:@$str):@$str{let result=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<dict.len;i=i+1){let candidate=dict.get(i);if(isanagram(word;candidate))){result=result+@(candidate);};};<result};

programs.hint: E9020: no main function defined. Every EXECUTABLE toke program needs an entry point. Add `f=main():$i64{<0;}` (or one that reads stdin via io.readln(), calls your helper functions, and prints results via io.println). Library-only modules compile under --check but cannot be built into a runnable binary.

programs.hint: Identifier 'mutator' starts with keyword 'mut'. Rename to avoid the W2020 → E3011/E4070 cascade. Use a/b/c/x/y/n or full words like idx, count, value — never start an identifier with as, el, lp, br, mt, rt, mut, let, if. | Undeclared identifier 's'. Check spelling; ensure it is bound with let before use; verify imports. Did you mean 'i'?
